calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: The matter comes on calendar this date, having been assigned by Department 206 for Uncontested Unlawful Detainer Trial.
Judge David L. Ballati, Clerk Nancy Regas, Court Reporter Susan Lee, CSR #4280, Dept. 604.
Alan Horwitz, attorney for Plaintiff is present. Brenda Lopez, property manager is present.
Defendant is not present.
Brenda Lopez is affirmed and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
Plaintiff's Exhibit #1 - Residential Tenancy Agreement - is admitted into evidence.
Plaintiff's Exhibit #2 - 3 day notice dated 9-18-06 - is admitted into evidence.
The matter is argued and submitted.
The Court orders Judgment in favor of Plaintiff. Plaintiff is awarded restitution and possession of the premises. Plaintiff is to recover the sum of $3,908.35 rent and $3,350.00 damages plus costs of $280.00, for a total of $7,538.35 from Defendant.
See Judgment signed and filed this date.
Exhibits are returned.
